posts.title: Feature Interview: Our Fears Made Manifest
posts.excerpt: When my collection Our Fears Made Manifest came out, I did a feature interview with Awesome Gang about the book and the ideas behind it.
posts.body:
When my collection Our Fears Made Manifest came out, I did an interview with Awesome Gang to talk about the collection and the ideas behind it.

The conversation offers a fuller look at the project and the writing life around it.

Read the interview on Awesome Gang.

posts.title: Current Project: A Boy Named Doctor
posts.excerpt: I'm currently working toward my MFA in creative writing and completing A Boy Named Doctor, a coming-of-age novel set in the California desert.
posts.body:
I'm currently working toward my MFA in creative writing and completing A Boy Named Doctor.

The novel is a coming-of-age story set in the California desert following a young boy navigating loss, identity, and survival. Through raw experiences and shifting relationships, he begins to understand who he is and who he might become.
